properties.name: box.web.response-wrap-enabled
properties.description: Whether controller responses should be wrapped as Result.

properties.name: box.web.request-caching-enabled
properties.description: Whether request and response bodies should be cached for later logging.

properties.name: box.web.request-logging-enabled
properties.description: Whether lightweight access logging interceptor is enabled.

properties.name: box.web.trace-id-header
properties.description: Header name used for trace id propagation.

properties.name: box.web.max-payload-length
properties.description: Maximum length of cached payload content used by web helpers.
